title: Sugar Wars - The Rise of the Cleveland Mafia
original_title: Sugar Wars - The Rise of the Cleveland Mafia
overview: The Sugar Wars chronicles the story of the Lonardos, the first organized crime family in Cleveland, Ohio. On his deathbed, Angelo Lonardo comes out of hiding at 90 years old to tell the story of the Cleveland Mafia.
